reviews.comment:
Mal atendido y peligroso.
Al lado de la villa del buen Ayre con custodias policiales. Hoy Axion o Shell nos ofrecen propuestas acordes a las épocas rápidas en las qye vivimos. Tuve qye buscar al expendedor para pagarle porque están adentro de un cuartito. Durmiendo. Solo lo recomiendo en caso de emergencia por combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service and dangerous.
Next to the Villa del Buen Ayre, with police escorts. Today, Axion or Shell offer options more in line with the fast-paced times we live in. I had to find the attendant to pay him because they were inside a small room, asleep. I only recommend it in case of a fuel emergency.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURta2NmR0R3EAE
